title: Cold Torch
description: The Cold Torch is a decorative iron torch that emits  no actual light level or heat. It possesses a chilling aura that instantly freezes nearby water into ice and applies a slowness effect to any mobs
body: Cold Torch is a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that adds a decorative light with utility effects. Unlike vanilla torches, it emits zero light level, so it does not prevent mob spawning or melt snow. It also has an effect like frost walker which creates a radius of 3 with ice and also causes slowness.
